hero.title: Your website, 100% custom-built. From cloud deployment to ongoing monitoring and monthly maintenance.
hero.subtitle: I work directly with clients looking for more than a functional site: they want a tool that reflects who they are and helps them grow.
hero.note: Data & AI Engineer with professional experience in web design and development. I've worked across all kinds of projects: from architecture and healthcare to banking and e-commerce.

principles.label: Full transparency
principles.text: You see your website progress in real-time. No surprises at the end.

principles.label: Always custom
principles.text: Every line of code crafted for your case. No template drag-and-drop.

principles.label: Modern tech
principles.text: React, Next.js, Vercel deployment. Fast, scalable, professional.

projects.intro: I've worked with architects, veterinarians, streamers and travel agencies. Each project with its own needs, all with the same criterion:
projects.criteria: clean code, design that works and straightforward delivery.
projects.title: Recent work

difference.title: Why I'm not an agency
difference.text: I don't do corporate layers or generic services. You get a dedicated developer building your site from the ground up. We talk directly, I dive deep into your business, and I build the solution myself. It’s a 1:1 partnership designed to ensure your website turns out exactly how you envisioned it.
difference.quote: You bring the vision; I bring the code. As long as you know exactly what you want, technical limits don't exist.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Web solutions tailored to your needs
services.disclaimer: This is not a corporate professional service. I'm an independent developer who creates personalized websites with passion and dedication.

basic.title: Basic Website
basic.description: Modern static website for your business
basic.ideal: Ideal for: Restaurants, salons, clinics, portfolios, landing pages

advanced.title: Advanced Website
advanced.description: Full web application with dynamic features
advanced.ideal: Ideal for: E-commerce, booking systems, membership platforms

seo.title: SEO & Google Management
seo.description: Improve your visibility in local searches
seo.ideal: Ideal for: Local businesses wanting more customers from their area

step1.title: Initial Consultation
step1.description: We discuss your business, goals, and design preferences

step2.title: Transparent Development

step3.description: Your website ready to use with domain configured if desired
